title: dubautia scabra
intro: Dubautia scabra, also known as the rough hawaiian hawthorn or rough naupaka, is a flowering plant species native to Hawaii and the Marquesas Islands. It has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dubautia scabra include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and protect against cardiovascular disease. Dubautia scabra can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote cardiovascular health and well-being.
